description_long: This is a dark wooden desk with a rectangular shape and a smooth, flat top surface. The front side features three drawers on each side, each with a round knob, providing storage space. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance. On the top surface, there are two paper items resembling wanted posters, adding a touch of character. The sides and back are plain, with no additional features or decorations. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for office or study use in an urban environment.
description: A dark wooden desk with six drawers and a smooth top, featuring two paper items on its surface.
description_view_0: The back of the desk, showing a plain wooden panel with visible wood grain and two paper items on top.
description_view_1: A side view of the desk, highlighting the thickness of the tabletop and the placement of the paper items.
description_view_2: The front of the desk, displaying six drawers with round knobs and an open knee space beneath the tabletop.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wooden side and the paper items on top.
